data.name: Hentai Age Party
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a delightful and soothing puzzle adventure where every stage you complete reveals stunning, seductive images of beautiful girls. Gentle background music sets a relaxing mood as you carefully swap and arrange tiles to uncover the full picture. Challenge yourself with puzzles that grow progressively more difficult, testing both your focus and strategic thinking.

Play freely without time limits, giving you the chance to enjoy solving puzzles at your own pace. Whether you’re a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this game offers a visually captivating and rewarding experience.

Feature :

Unlock mesmerizing and attractive girl images with every completed level.

Relax with calming background music that enriches your gameplay.

Access a full-image view once each puzzle is solved.

Experience countless stages with increasing difficulty for lasting fun.

No timers—enjoy a stress-free puzzle journey at your rhythm.

data.short_description: Relaxing puzzle game with soothing music, revealing stunning girl images as you complete each level. Increasing difficulty tests focus and strategy, offering a captivating, rewarding experience without time limits.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
